/usr/bin/ar qc libWWMath.a CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/aabox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/aabtreecull.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/cardinalspline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/catmullromspline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathaabox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathaabtri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathfrustum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathobbobb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathobbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathobbtri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathplane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/colmathsphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/cullsys.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/curve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/euler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/frustum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/gridcull.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/hermitespline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/lineseg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/lookuptable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/matrix3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/matrix3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/matrix4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/obbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/ode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/pot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/quat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/tcbspline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/tri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/v3_rnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/vehiclecurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/vp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WWMath.dir/wwmath.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libWWMath.a
